reviews.comment:
Pedimos llenar el tanque y al pagar dice el empleado “ no anda la aplicación “ quisimos pagar con diversas cuentas y “ no hay internet”, solo efectivo “ . Una vergüenza!!!

(Translated by Google)
We asked to fill up the tank, and when we went to pay, the employee said, "The app isn't working." We tried to pay with different accounts, but they said, "There's no internet, only cash." A disgrace!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyei1xWlNnEAE
